quest_beast_menace.title: The Growing Threat
quest_beast_menace.description: The Village Elder has asked you to investigate the beast attacks near Ashenvale.
quest_beast_menace.objective: Defeat the Dire Wolf Alpha lurking in the Silverwood Forest.

quest_poisoned_crops.title: Poisoned Fields
quest_poisoned_crops.description: The Farmer's crops are being destroyed by unusually aggressive vipers. Find and defeat their queen.
quest_poisoned_crops.objective: Defeat the Viper Queen lurking in the eastern Verdant Plains.

quest_healers_research.title: The Healer's Research
quest_healers_research.description: The village Healer senses rising magical energy in the forest and asks you to explore it.
quest_healers_research.objective: Travel north into the Silverwood Forest.

quest_wanderers_secret.title: The Wanderer's Secret
quest_wanderers_secret.description: A wanderer swears the mountains breathe warm air. There may be a hidden passage in the Stormcrag range.
quest_wanderers_secret.objective: Discover the hidden passage in the Stormcrag Mountains.

quest_blacksmith_commission.title: The Blacksmith's Commission
quest_blacksmith_commission.description: The Ironhaven blacksmith needs rare feathers from the forest's Thunder Hawk King to forge a masterwork blade.
quest_blacksmith_commission.objective: Defeat the Thunder Hawk King deep in the Silverwood Forest.

quest_family_history.title: Family History
quest_family_history.description: Archivist Lena has records about families who left Subterra 60 years ago — possibly including yours. Seek your ancestral home.
quest_family_history.objective: Find and read the journal in your ancestral home in Subterra.

quest_into_darkness.title: Into the Darkness
quest_into_darkness.description: The Elder of Willowmere warns that the Black Knight's forces are massing in the Stormcrag Mountains. Stop them.
quest_into_darkness.objective: Defeat the BK Lieutenant at the Stormcrag Mountain Pass.

quest_crystal_colossus.title: The Crystal Colossus
quest_crystal_colossus.description: A massive crystal golem guards the path deep in the Stormcrag Mountains. Defeat it to claim its power.
quest_crystal_colossus.objective: Defeat the Crystal Sentinel guarding the path to Subterra.

quest_corrupted_throne.title: The Corrupted Throne
quest_corrupted_throne.description: Elder Marek believes the surface darkness stems from the Corrupted Beast King serving the Black Knight. Strike at its source.
quest_corrupted_throne.objective: Defeat the Corrupted Beast King at the Black Fortress in the Dark Lands.

quest_final_stand.title: The Final Stand
quest_final_stand.description: With his forces broken, the Black Knight himself awaits at the Black Fortress. End this conflict once and for all.
quest_final_stand.objective: Defeat the Black Knight at the Black Fortress.
